sponsors.name: Tata Consultancy Services
sponsors.why: As a leading Indian company with significant investments in AI research and development, TCS would be a natural fit to sponsor an AI event in India
sponsors.approach: Reach out to their corporate marketing team to discuss sponsorship opportunities

sponsors.name: Infosys
sponsors.why: Infosys has a strong presence in India and has made notable investments in AI, making them a likely sponsor for an AI event
sponsors.approach: Contact their innovation and technology team to explore sponsorship possibilities

sponsors.name: Google
sponsors.why: As a global AI leader with a significant presence in India, Google would be interested in sponsoring an AI event to showcase their technologies and expertise
sponsors.approach: Reach out to their India marketing team to discuss potential sponsorship opportunities

sponsors.name: Wipro
sponsors.why: Wipro has a strong AI practice in India and would be a good fit to sponsor an AI event, especially with their focus on innovation and digital transformation
sponsors.approach: Contact their business development team to explore sponsorship possibilities

sponsors.name: Microsoft
sponsors.why: Microsoft has a significant presence in India and has made notable investments in AI, making them a potential sponsor for an AI event
sponsors.approach: Reach out to their India marketing team to discuss potential sponsorship opportunities

sponsors.name: IBM
sponsors.why: IBM has a long history of investing in AI research and development and has a presence in India, making them a potential sponsor for an AI event
sponsors.approach: Contact their India research team to explore potential sponsorship opportunities

speakers.name: Dr. Gaurav Sharma
speakers.title: Professor, Indian Institute of Science (IISc)
speakers.why: As a renowned professor at IISc, Dr. Sharma can share insights on AI's impact on education in India.

speakers.name: Manoj Jain
speakers.title: CMD, Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL)
speakers.why: Having spoken at the AI for India Summit 2025, Manoj Jain can provide valuable insights on AI's applications in defence.

speakers.name: Dr. S. Sundararajan
speakers.title: Professor, Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Delhi
speakers.why: As a professor at IIT Delhi, Dr. Sundararajan can share his expertise on the latest developments in deep learning.

speakers.name: Rohini Srivathsa
speakers.title: National Technology Officer, Microsoft India
speakers.why: With her experience at Microsoft India, Rohini can provide insights on AI adoption in various industries.

speakers.name: Dr. Venkatesh Babu
speakers.title: Professor, Indian Institute of Science (IISc)
speakers.suggested_slot: Workshop: Computer Vision for Social Good
speakers.why: Dr. Babu's expertise in computer vision can help participants understand its applications in social good projects.

speakers.name: Ganesh Padmanabhan
speakers.title: Director, Analytics and AI, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)
speakers.why: With his experience at TCS, Ganesh can share his knowledge on building scalable AI solutions for businesses.

ticket_tiers.name: Early Bird
ticket_tiers.perks: 10% discount, priority access to keynotes, and exclusive networking opportunities

ticket_tiers.name: Standard
ticket_tiers.perks: access to keynotes, panel discussions, and startup showcase

ticket_tiers.name: VIP
ticket_tiers.perks: priority access to keynotes, exclusive networking opportunities, and a private meet-and-greet with speakers

ticket_tiers.name: Virtual
ticket_tiers.perks: access to live stream, recorded sessions, and exclusive virtual networking opportunities

pricing.rationale: Given the unknown ticket price range at similar events, we've adopted a tiered pricing strategy with early bird discounts to incentivize registrations. Prices range from $150 to $300 for in-person tickets, with a virtual option at $50, to cater to different segments of the audience.

channels.name: LinkedIn
channels.strategy: Create engaging content (articles, videos, podcasts) highlighting the latest AI trends and advancements, and utilize LinkedIn groups to reach AI professionals and industry experts.

channels.name: Twitter/X
channels.strategy: Utilize hashtags to create buzz around the event, share updates, and engage with attendees and speakers on Twitter.

channels.name: Email Marketing
channels.strategy: Send targeted email campaigns to subscribers, highlighting key speakers, sessions, and networking opportunities.

channels.name: Indian AI Communities
channels.strategy: Partner with Indian AI communities, startups, and universities to promote the conference and offer exclusive discounts to their members.

channels.name: Influencer Marketing
channels.strategy: Collaborate with AI influencers and thought leaders to promote the event and share their experiences with their followers.

channels.name: Content Marketing
channels.strategy: Create informative blog posts, whitepapers, and case studies highlighting the benefits of AI in India, and share them on the event website and social media channels.

timeline.action: Launch event website and early bird tickets, and start promoting the event on social media and email marketing campaigns.
Send targeted email campaigns to subscribers, and start partnering with Indian AI communities, startups, and universities.
Launch influencer marketing campaigns, and start creating engaging content (articles, videos, podcasts) highlighting the latest AI trends and advancements.
Send reminders to attendees, and start promoting the event on Twitter and LinkedIn.
Host a pre-event hackathon or startup pitch competition to attract a wider audience.

key_messages: Explore the latest trends, advancements, and applications of AI technology in India.
Network with thought leaders, industry experts, and innovators from the AI sector.
Discover new opportunities and challenges in AI adoption and deployment in India.

outreach_templates.startup_subject: Apply for AI in India Summit Startup Pitch Competition

tasks.task: Define event concept and objectives
Establish event budget and financial plan
Identify and secure venue
Research and select ticketing platform
Develop event website and registration process
Create event social media accounts and content calendar
Finalize venue details and contracts
Arrange for catering and beverages
Coordinate with venue for audio-visual and technical requirements
Book accommodations for speakers and VIPs
Arrange for transportation and parking
Confirm speaker details and contracts
Coordinate speaker travel and accommodations
Develop speaker presentation guidelines and requirements
Arrange for speaker audio-visual and technical requirements
Coordinate speaker interviews and media appearances
Confirm sponsor details and contracts
Coordinate sponsor branding and marketing materials
Arrange for sponsor audio-visual and technical requirements
Coordinate sponsor networking and meet-and-greets
Develop and execute social media marketing campaign
Create and distribute promotional materials (flyers, posters, etc.)
Coordinate with influencers and bloggers for event promotion
Develop and execute email marketing campaign
Arrange for event press coverage and media outreach
Finalize event setup and logistics
Coordinate with speakers and sponsors for event day
Manage event registration and ticketing
Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for event day
Manage event day operations and logistics

feedback.sponsor: The sponsor suggestions are highly relevant to the event, with a good mix of Indian companies and global leaders in AI.
feedback.speaker: The speaker suggestions are relevant and have a good balance of expertise, but could benefit from more diversity in terms of industry representation.
feedback.venue: The venue suggestions are suitable for the event, but the estimated daily costs could be more detailed, including breakdowns of expenses.
feedback.pricing: The pricing tiers are clear, but the perks for each tier could be more detailed and creative to attract a wider range of attendees.
feedback.gtm: The GTM strategy is comprehensive, but could benefit from more specific metrics for measuring success and a clearer allocation of budget across channels.
